历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 17580 → 17855 → 18891 → 21997 → 19378, showing an overall backward trend. In 2024, it significantly shifted back to 21997, then rebounded to 19378 in 2025, with large fluctuations in recent two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 19378. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 76 in 2021, 54 in 2022, 80 in 2023, 83 in 2024, and 86 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 106, an expansion of about 23.3% compared to 2025, notably increasing admission slots, easing competition pressure but potentially boosting application attractiveness.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Its ranking on the Soft Science main list has been rising, from 76th in 2021 to 69th in 2026, showing steady improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition. During the 2022 reputation cycle, there was an academic misconduct incident (somewhat negative), but recent reputation has been stable. Its Douyin popularity ranks 75th (rated 'average'), with comprehensive popularity around 350,000, short video exposure at a medium level, no clear signal of rising application attention. There is no record of admission anomalies in historical data. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, four disciplines—Crop Science, Plant Protection, Animal Science, and Grassland Science—were rated A-, highlighting distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, which attract applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remain highly popular. The university's engineering majors (e.g., Computer Science, Electrical Engineering) benefit from this overall trend. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in Hubei is approximately 393,700, a slight increase from about 391,200 in 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category examinees is about 251,400 (a slight increase of about 0.6% from 249,800 in 2025), leading to slightly intensified competition. The university is located in Shaanxi (not within Hubei), and its enrollment proportion in Hubei is not high. In 2025, the 86 students enrolled in Hubei account for a small proportion of the university's total national enrollment, so cross-province regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound of the 2025 ranking to 19378, the significant enrollment expansion of about 23.3% in 2026 increasing slots, the positive signal of rising Soft Science ranking, and the slight increase of about 0.6% in Hubei Physics Category examinees intensifying competition slightly, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift backward compared to the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 22132, with a range of 21632–22632.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Electronic Information Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mechanical Engineering (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Mechatronic Engineering, Vehicle Engineering)
- Water Resources (Water Resources and Hydropower Engineering, Hydrology and Water Resources Engineering, Agricultural Water Conservancy Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Agronomy (Agronomy Category)
- Plant Protection
- Horticulture (Horticulture Category)
- Grassland Science
- Food Science and Engineering Category.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 21632–22632, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors as the main choice, moderately aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 21000), you can focus on aiming for popular engineering majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering. If your ranking is near the upper bound (e.g., above 22500), it is advisable to use Tier 3 agricultural and forestry characteristic majors as safety options to ensure admission.
